mapper.select: SELECT h.id AS house_id, h.room_num, h.org_name, h.building_name, h.unit_code, he.id AS expense_id, he.item_code, he.item_group, s.name AS standard_name, s.standard_price, ei.item_name FROM pr_house h LEFT JOIN pr_user_house uh ON h.id = uh.house_id AND uh.del_flag = '0' AND uh.relation_type = '1' LEFT JOIN pr_house_expense he ON h.id = he.house_id AND he.item_group = '4' LEFT JOIN pr_standard s ON he.standard_id = s.id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item ei ON he.item_code = ei.item_code AND he.item_group = ei.item_group WHERE h.del_flag = '0' AND h.company_id = #{companyId} AND h.org_id = #{orgId} AND h.building_id = #{buildingId} AND h.unit_code = #{unitCode} AND h.room_num = TRIM(#{search})
